news.title:
Sensex recovers 450 points, Nifty aims rebound after oil drop, US rally.
Stocks to watch: Reliance, Sun Pharma, Tata Motors CV, RVNL.
news.summary:
Sensex recovers 450 points, Nifty aims rebound after oil drop, US rally.
Stocks to watch: Reliance, Sun Pharma, Tata Motors CV, RVNL.

news.title:
Tata Motors to raise commercial vehicle prices by 1.5% from April 1, 2026; Sun Pharma's sBLA for ILUMYA accepted by US FDA.
RVNL wins ₹95.3 crore contract in Chhattisgarh; GMDC signs MoU with NMDC for rare earth collaboration in Gujarat.
news.summary:
Tata Motors to raise commercial vehicle prices by 1.5% from April 1, 2026; Sun Pharma's sBLA for ILUMYA accepted by US FDA.
RVNL wins ₹95.3 crore contract in Chhattisgarh; GMDC signs MoU with NMDC for rare earth collaboration in Gujarat.

news.title:
RVNL secures ₹95.3 crore contract from NMDC for track refurbishment in Chhattisgarh.
Q3 revenue up 2.6% YoY; EBITDA down 8%, margin at 4.7%. Interim dividend ₹1/share approved.
news.summary:
RVNL secures ₹95.3 crore contract from NMDC for track refurbishment in Chhattisgarh.
Q3 revenue up 2.6% YoY; EBITDA down 8%, margin at 4.7%. Interim dividend ₹1/share approved.

news.title: RVNL secures an order worth Rs 95.2 crore from NMDC.
news.summary: RVNL secures an order worth Rs 95.2 crore from NMDC.

news.title:
RVNL received LOA from NMDC for refurbishment and maintenance work at Kirandul-Bacheli, Chhattisgarh.
The project, valued at INR 95.3 Cr including GST, is to be completed in 36 months.
news.summary:
RVNL received LOA from NMDC for refurbishment and maintenance work at Kirandul-Bacheli, Chhattisgarh.
The project, valued at INR 95.3 Cr including GST, is to be completed in 36 months.

news.title:
IRCON and RVNL shares surged up to 12% following merger reports.
Railways Ministry reportedly proposed merging these PSUs, boosting investor sentiment.
news.summary:
IRCON and RVNL shares surged up to 12% following merger reports.
Railways Ministry reportedly proposed merging these PSUs, boosting investor sentiment.

news.title:
CARE reaffirmed Rail Vikas Nigam's long-term rating at CARE AAA (Stable).
The ratings highlight a strong credit profile and stable outlook.
news.summary:
CARE reaffirmed Rail Vikas Nigam's long-term rating at CARE AAA (Stable).
The ratings highlight a strong credit profile and stable outlook.

news.title:
RVNL fined Rs. 9.77L by NSE & BSE for non-compliance in Board composition for Dec 2025.
RVNL clarified directors are appointed by Govt., seeking fine waiver upon compliance.
news.summary:
RVNL fined Rs. 9.77L by NSE & BSE for non-compliance in Board composition for Dec 2025.
RVNL clarified directors are appointed by Govt., seeking fine waiver upon compliance.

news.title:
RVNL secured ₹1,978 crore NMDC orders and ₹270.2 crore Central Railway contract.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 4% YoY to ₹324 crore; order book exceeds ₹60,000 crore.
news.summary:
RVNL secured ₹1,978 crore NMDC orders and ₹270.2 crore Central Railway contract.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 4% YoY to ₹324 crore; order book exceeds ₹60,000 crore.

news.title:
Rail Vikas Nigam secures additional orders worth ₹13.4B from NMDC.
This highlights a strong partnership and boosts project work.
news.summary:
Rail Vikas Nigam secures additional orders worth ₹13.4B from NMDC.
This highlights a strong partnership and boosts project work.

news.title: RVNL secures ₹371.7 crore township development contract from NMDC in Chhattisgarh.
news.summary: RVNL secures ₹371.7 crore township development contract from NMDC in Chhattisgarh.

news.title:
Reliance Industries forms a strategic partnership with Facebook for REIL, altering its subsidiary structure and boosting tech focus.
Yes Bank flagged a $0.28M fraud, RVNL and Texmaco secured infra deals, and Lupin faced GST inspection; diverse corporate updates dominate.
news.summary:
Reliance Industries forms a strategic partnership with Facebook for REIL, altering its subsidiary structure and boosting tech focus.
Yes Bank flagged a $0.28M fraud, RVNL and Texmaco secured infra deals, and Lupin faced GST inspection; diverse corporate updates dominate.

news.title:
Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd received LOA from NMDC for a residential tower project in Chhattisgarh.
The project aligns with their business; no financial details disclosed as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd received LOA from NMDC for a residential tower project in Chhattisgarh.
The project aligns with their business; no financial details disclosed as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
RVNL secures a ₹270 crore contract from Central Railway for a new power system.
The project is aimed at developing power systems for Daund Solapur trains.
news.summary:
RVNL secures a ₹270 crore contract from Central Railway for a new power system.
The project is aimed at developing power systems for Daund Solapur trains.

news.title: Rail Vikas Nigam won a ₹270.2 Cr order from Central Railway for Daund-Solapur Traction Substation.
news.summary: Rail Vikas Nigam won a ₹270.2 Cr order from Central Railway for Daund-Solapur Traction Substation.

news.title:
Rail Vikas Nigam secures Rs 270-cr EPC order for Daund-Solapur section, to be executed in 24 months.
RVNL's Q3 FY26 net profit rose 3.7% YoY to Rs 322.8 cr; shares rose 0.7% to Rs 321.65 on BSE.
news.summary:
Rail Vikas Nigam secures Rs 270-cr EPC order for Daund-Solapur section, to be executed in 24 months.
RVNL's Q3 FY26 net profit rose 3.7% YoY to Rs 322.8 cr; shares rose 0.7% to Rs 321.65 on BSE.

news.title:
Texmaco and Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd form JV to enhance rail manufacturing.
JV to focus on lifecycle maintenance, EPC projects, and overseas markets.
news.summary:
Texmaco and Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd form JV to enhance rail manufacturing.
JV to focus on lifecycle maintenance, EPC projects, and overseas markets.

news.title:
Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd (RVNL) signs JV Shareholders' Agreement with Texmaco Rail & Engineering.
The agreement focuses on the formation and operation of a joint venture company.
news.summary:
Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd (RVNL) signs JV Shareholders' Agreement with Texmaco Rail & Engineering.

news.title: RVNL secures a major contract worth ₹1200 Cr, highlighting growth in infrastructure.

news.title:
Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd received LOA from Northern Railway for a Rail Cum Road Bridge project near Kashi Railway Station.
The project includes railway, road approaches, OHE, and electrical works with a 48-month execution period.
news.summary:
Rail Vikas Nigam Ltd received LOA from Northern Railway for a Rail Cum Road Bridge project near Kashi Railway Station.
